article_meta.title: MoneyWatch Can TrumpRx help you save money on drugs? Here's what experts say

reasoning: One clear attribution rule violation (flagging quoted language as author bias) and multiple questionable/overstated flags. Missed at least one clearer author-level bias instance (use of 'so-called').

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Item 2 flags a quoted source’s phrasing ('catalog of coupons'), violating the rule to exclude quotes.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Item 2 is an attribution violation; Item 3 asserts Bias by Omission despite inclusion of White House perspective and extensive pricing list; Item 1’s 'Slant' claim is weakly supported.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed clearer author-level bias such as the skeptical framing 'so-called "most-favored-nation" agreements.'
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Because the flagged instances were largely not genuine author-bias (or were attribution errors), type labels are not reliably correct; the 'Slant' label is debatable rather than clearly right.
